widget.name: Tabulator Data Grid
widget.description: Feature-rich data grid powered by Tabulator.info with sorting, filtering, grouping, pagination, export and more

property.caption: Enable spreadsheet mode
property.description: Show an embedded spreadsheet instead of the data grid. When enabled, Data source and Columns are not used.

property.caption: Data source
property.description: Mendix object list to display in the grid

property.caption: Columns
property.description: Define one column per attribute or custom content

property.caption: Show
property.description: How to display data in this column

property.caption: Attribute
property.description: The attribute to show in this column

property.caption: Dynamic text
property.description: Text template per row (active when Show = Dynamic text)

property.caption: Custom content
property.description: Widgets rendered per row (active when Show = Custom content)

property.caption: Width (px)
property.description: Column width in pixels (0 = auto)

property.caption: Min width (px)
property.description: Minimum column width in pixels

property.caption: Header
property.description: Column header text. Auto-filled with the attribute name when an attribute is selected.

property.caption: Sortable
property.description: Allow sorting by clicking the column header

property.caption: Header filter
property.description: Show a filter input below the column header

property.caption: Editable
property.description: Allow the user to edit this cell value inline. The attribute must be writable in Mendix.

property.caption: On cell edited
property.description: Action executed in the context of the row after the user changes a cell value

property.caption: Resizable
property.description: Allow the user to resize this column

property.caption: Freeze column
property.description: Pin this column to the left edge of the grid

property.caption: Alignment
property.description: Horizontal alignment (auto = right for numbers, center for boolean, left otherwise)

property.caption: Cell CSS class
property.description: Expression returning a CSS class name per row, e.g. if $currentObject/Priority = 'High' then 'tab-danger' else ''. Built-in: tab-danger, tab-warning, tab-success, tab-info, tab-muted.

property.caption: Formatter
property.description: How to render the cell value. Value = plain text; ProgressBar = 0–100 bar; Star = star rating (0–5); TickCross = checkbox; Money = currency; HTML = raw HTML; Color = color swatch; Link = hyperlink; Toggle = on/off toggle; Textarea = multi-line text; Image = img tag; DateTimeDiff = time-ago; Traffic = traffic light; ButtonTick / ButtonCross = action buttons.

property.caption: Decimal places
property.description: Fixed decimal places for numeric values (-1 = use Mendix default)

property.caption: Currency symbol
property.description: Prefix symbol, e.g. €, $, £ (applied when Decimal places ≥ 0 or Formatter = Money)

property.caption: Date format
property.description: Pattern, e.g. dd-MM-yyyy | dd-MM-yyyy HH:mm (empty = Mendix default)

property.caption: Aggregate
property.description: Show an aggregate in the summary row. Sum/Average/Max/Min require a numeric attribute column.

property.caption: Group by
property.description: Include this column in the Group-by toolbar. Multiple columns create nested groups.

property.caption: XPath attribute name
property.description: Attribute name, e.g. Amount or Description. Required for: (1) XPath filter writing, (2) reliable inline cell editing — the widget uses this name to write the new value directly to the Mendix object so the nanoflow receives the updated value.

property.caption: Show tooltip
property.description: Show the cell value as a tooltip on hover

property.caption: Selection
property.description: None = no selection. Single = one row at a time. Multi = multiple rows via checkboxes.

property.caption: Show selection column
property.description: Show a checkbox column for multi-selection mode

property.caption: Auto-select row on startup
property.description: Automatically select this row when the grid loads. 0 = no auto-selection, 1 = first row, 2 = second row, etc.

property.caption: On row selected
property.description: Fires in the context of a row when it is added to the selection

property.caption: On row deselected
property.description: Fires in the context of a row when it is removed from the selection

property.caption: Enable CSV export
property.description: Show an Export CSV button in the toolbar

property.caption: Enable Excel export
property.description: Show an Export Excel button (downloads .xlsx)

property.caption: Enable JSON export
property.description: Show an Export JSON button

property.caption: Enable PDF export
property.description: Show a Print/PDF button (uses browser print dialog)

property.caption: Enable clipboard copy
property.description: Show a Copy button that copies the selected (or all) rows to clipboard

property.caption: Export filename
property.description: Filename for downloaded files (without extension)

property.caption: Toolbar widgets
property.description: Additional widgets shown in the toolbar (e.g. import button)

property.caption: On row click
property.description: Action executed when the user clicks a row

property.caption: On row double-click
property.description: Action executed when the user double-clicks a row

property.caption: Empty placeholder
property.description: Text shown when the data source returns no rows

property.caption: Enable row reorder
property.description: Show a drag handle so the user can reorder rows

property.caption: On row reordered
property.description: Action executed in the context of the moved row after it is dropped

property.caption: Reorder target row ID
property.description: String attribute that receives the ID of the row now below the moved row (empty = moved to last position)

property.caption: Enable master / detail
property.description: Show an expand toggle on each row to reveal a detail panel

property.caption: Detail content
property.description: Widgets rendered in the collapsible detail panel below each row

property.caption: Detail panel height (px)
property.description: Height of the expanded detail panel in pixels

property.caption: Configuration attribute
property.description: Unlimited String attribute to persist sort, filter and column order. Surround the widget with a Data view to select an attribute.

property.caption: On configuration change
property.description: Action executed after the configuration attribute is updated (e.g. to commit the object)

property.caption: Filter XPath constraint attribute
property.description: String attribute where the widget writes the current filter as an XPath constraint. Requires XPath attribute name per column.

property.caption: Enable header filters
property.description: Show filter inputs in column headers (must also enable Header filter per column)

property.caption: Enable filter bar
property.description: Show a filter bar above the grid with column, comparison type and value selectors (setFilter API)

property.caption: Summary position
property.description: Show a row with aggregate values (sum, count, average, max, min) above or below the data

property.caption: Enable group by
property.description: Show a Group by panel. Columns with Group by enabled can be toggled as grouping levels.

property.caption: Enable column chooser
property.description: Show a Columns button that lets users show or hide individual columns

property.caption: Enable column reordering
property.description: Allow users to drag column headers to reorder columns

property.caption: Row striping
property.description: Alternate row background color for even rows

property.caption: Row height (px)
property.description: Height of each data row in pixels

property.caption: Grid height (px)
property.description: Total height of the grid in pixels

property.caption: Column layout
property.description: fitData = each column is its configured width; fitColumns = stretch to fill grid width; fitDataFill = like fitData but fills remaining space; fitDataStretch = like fitData but last column stretches.

property.caption: Enable responsive layout
property.description: Automatically hide columns when the grid is too narrow. Columns are hidden right-to-left.

property.caption: Enable pagination
property.description: Split data into pages with navigation controls

property.caption: Page size
property.description: Number of rows per page

property.caption: Position
property.description: Show pagination controls above or below the grid

property.caption: Show page-size selector
property.description: Allow users to change the number of rows per page

property.caption: Sheet data source
property.description: JSON attribute = load and save sheet data as JSON in the Data attribute. Data source = fill the sheet from the Data source and Columns (General tab); edits are not written back to the objects, but are still saved to the Data attribute as JSON when one is set. Data source mode uses a single sheet.

property.caption: Include header row
property.description: Data source mode: put the column headers in the first sheet row

property.caption: Rows
property.description: Number of rows in the spreadsheet grid

property.caption: Columns
property.description: Number of columns in the spreadsheet grid

property.caption: Data attribute
property.description: Unlimited String attribute where spreadsheet data is stored and loaded as JSON. Wrap the widget in a Data view to select an attribute.

property.caption: On data change
property.description: Action executed after each cell edit (e.g. to commit the object)

property.caption: Show sheet tabs
property.description: Show tabs at the bottom to switch between sheets (requires Sheets to be configured)

property.caption: Sheets
property.description: Define multiple sheets. When empty a single unnamed sheet is used.

property.caption: Title
property.description: Display name shown in the sheet tab

property.caption: Key
property.description: Unique identifier for this sheet (used as key in the stored JSON)

property.caption: Rows
property.description: Number of rows for this sheet (0 = use global Rows setting)

property.caption: Columns
property.description: Number of columns for this sheet (0 = use global Columns setting)

property.caption: Enable range clipboard
property.description: Allow Ctrl+C / Ctrl+V to copy and paste cell ranges
